title: Research Persona Harness v1 (Candidate-only)

scope.intent: Introduce a bounded, governed persona harness that emits PersonaCandidatePacketV1 objects as *candidates only*. No active registry entry, brain overlay, validation summary, or artifact is promoted by this harness.
scope.anti_drift_rule: Persona output is a candidate artifact-like packet; it is NEVER active truth. Promotion still requires PIT + provenance + validation + runtime explainability + explicit promotion gate.

new_cli_commands.name: emit-persona-candidates
new_cli_commands.description: Emit governed PersonaCandidatePacketV1 objects to stdout or --out-json. Built-in bounded demo set exists when --config is omitted.

guardrails.promotion_doctrine_note: hard-coded on every packet and reminds operators that candidates are not active truth
guardrails.candidate_id: deterministic sha256 of (persona, thesis_family, targeted_horizon, targeted_universe) — idempotent replays

coverage: rejects unknown persona / out-of-range confidence / unknown horizon
report writer emits contract JSON on disk
report writer never mutates any bundle file in data/mvp
gate_eligibility true flags still keep packet as candidate-only

pre_existing_failures: src/tests/test_phase39_hypothesis_family.py::test_phase39_orchestrator_writes_artifacts (unrelated to Pragmatic Brain Absorption v1; predates this branch)

non_goals_confirmed: No active registry / artifact is created by personas
No overlays are auto-attached by personas
No factor_validation_* row is inserted or modified
No Replay / Today surface changes in this milestone — cash-out is Milestone E
